reviews.reviewComments: Strategic place near mosque and also walking distance from shops and restaurants not so far. Room was not cleaned properly. Can repeat again but need to ask the staff for hospitality first before using the room.

reviews.reviewPositives: Eingenlijk wil ik geen ster geven, we kregen geen kamer gehad ondanks we hebben kamer online geboekt,maar ze hebben hun kamer verkocht aan andere, ze vroegen ons om upgrade kamer te doen met extra te betalen,na de hele discussie  uiteindelijk ze gingen ons gestuurd naar een van andere hotel in het centrum   (Wisma Nabila)maar echte prijs warren goedkoper dan hadden we online geboekt,zo vervelend 😣 kamer warren niet proper,badkamer is vies en klein. Ondanks rookvrije kamer zo geschreven maar in de gang van van onze kamer stonken naar sigaretten.

reviews.reviewComments:
Pada saat datang Kondisi kamar belum siap, Televisi belum terpasang, Listrik harus di hubungi ke penjaga karna kontak listrik di bawah semua.

pada saat mati lampu genset tidak ready langsung sehingga air tidak ada dan liatrik mati, petugas kurang sigap. 
parkiran kurang luas

reviews.reviewNegatives:
- tidak bersih
- ketika check in harus bayar2 lagi, padahal sudah lunas pembayaran lewat aplikasi
- suasana hotel seperti GUDANG
- harga tidak sepadan dengan fasilitas

reviews.reviewTitle: Misleading description, changed to other hotel (with lower standard)
reviews.reviewComments:
Booked Family Room, which in picture room have 2 bed, but in description only state 1 king bed. (Honestly i never found family room with only 1 bed). So the picture and description is misleading. 

Second is, at last minute, which is a few day before the actual date , i was told the hotel request to changed my booking to other hotel, which if i refuse they will refund money. The problem is, the stay date  is during major event, and other hotel room is fully booked, and i cant found other hotel with the same standard, causing a big difficulty to me. thus i accept the change even though the new hotel standard is bit lower than the original hotel that ive booked.

reviews.originalComment:
Pesan dr aplikasi, dihotel dikenakan biaya lg 30rb / mlm.
Pas masuk kamarny blm d bersihin, krn staff ny leyeh leyeh trakhir saya sbg pengunjung membantu staff membersihkan kamar sendiri agak bisa cepat istirahat.
reviews.reviewComments: Message from the application, there is an additional charge of 30,000 per night at the hotel. When I entered the room, it hadn't been cleaned yet, because the staff was lounging around. In the end, I as a guest helped the staff clean the room myself so I could rest a bit faster.

reviews.originalComment: Pertama datang shock banget, lantai kotor, sprei kotor, tong sampah isinya blm di buang. Bantal tidak rapi
reviews.reviewComments: First impression was shocking, the floor was dirty, the sheets were dirty, the trash bin had not been emptied. The pillows were messy.

the hotel is under renovation, the room is not ready & not suitable for parent with kids.

reviews.reviewComments: Dirty toilet, the tap water was temporarily unavailable.. No water heater, no bottled water available, the room had spider webs, and the toothbrush was poorly requested.
good
good hotels
Hotel under renovation. Bilik tak siap dan belum sesuai untuk open.
They will ask more money when u arrive....do not book this hotel ..room dirty...
They ask me to pay tax, eventho it’s already charged during my booking at Agoda. They also confirmed that they don’t use Agoda anymore to get reservations. The building is also unfinished.
After i check out from the hotel, i dont get my deposit back . Too many excuse , after 5 days from check out . still dont get my deposit money back .

reviews.originalComment:
1. harga : sampai hotel bayar lagi 60rb pdhl sudah lunas di bayar melalui aplikasi
2. fasiltas : wifi tidak ada, TV nyala tp tidak ada siaran, klu mau nonton tv harus hotspot dr HP sendiri.
reviews.reviewComments:
1. Price: upon arrival at the hotel, an additional 60,000 IDR is required even though it has already been fully paid through the application.  
2. Facilities: no wifi, the TV is on but there is no broadcast; if you want to watch TV, you have to hotspot from your own phone.

reviews.reviewComments: Everything is okay, the room looks new, but it lacks a clothes hanger and wifi, the TV cannot be used.

reviews.originalComment:
Resepsionis nya banyak tidak tahu.
Masa saya sudah booking buat cek di komputer mereka pun tidak tahu.  Setingkat air minum aja staff nya tanyak ke bos nya . Terus dalam kamar juga banyak pasir dan rambut kayak tidak dibersihkan. Selimut nya juga gak bersih ada bekas lipstik
reviews.reviewComments: The receptionist knows very little. When I had already booked, they didn't know how to check on their computer. Even for a simple bottle of water, the staff had to ask their boss. Additionally, there was a lot of sand and hair in the room as if it hadn't been cleaned. The blanket wasn't clean either; it had lipstick stains.

reviews.reviewTitle: The new hotel is still under construction.
reviews.originalTitle: โรงแรมใหม่ยังสร้างไม่เสร็จ
reviews.originalComment: โรงแรมใหม่ยังสร้างไม่เสร็จพนักงานให้การช่วยเหลือดีมีฝุ่นบ้างเสียงรบกวนจากด้านนอกไม่มีสิ่งอำนวยความสะดวก
reviews.reviewComments: The new hotel is not fully completed yet, the staff provides good assistance, there is some dust, noise from outside, and no amenities.
Pretty good location, in a nice neighbourhood close to a big street filled with food carts. Close enough to attractions such as mosque and tsunami museum. Room was adequate, fine for a night.

Air lemah, kamar lmyn kotor. Lmyn byk noda di tempat tidur
Wc jg kotor tidak disikat, wastafel jg tidak dibersihkan
reviews.reviewComments: The air is weak, the bathroom is dirty. There are many stains on the bed. The toilet is also dirty and hasn't been scrubbed, the sink hasn't been cleaned either.

reviews.originalComment: Selama berlibur di Banda Aceh, Urbanview Hotel Ranls Dream menjadi salah 1 kenangan berkesan dalam perjalanan kami. Hotelnya masih baru, toilet bersih nyaman, tempat tidur nyaman, dengan harga yg sangat murah begitu puas dengan fasilitas yg didapatkan 🥰
reviews.reviewComments: During our holiday in Banda Aceh, Urbanview Hotel Ranls Dream became one of the memorable experiences of our trip. The hotel is still new, the toilet is clean and comfortable, the bed is cozy, with a very cheap price. We were very satisfied with the facilities provided 🥰

abbiamo scelto questo hotel su agoda per via del prezzo e per la posizione, non sicuramente per il resto perché gia la presentazione fotografica fatta a computer ci diceva tutto. hotel non terminato, cavi elettrici che svolazzano e pure un vano per ascensore utilizzato come pattumiera. lhotel è un cantiere mai terminato ma fin qui può andare bene. al nostro arrivo ci viene gentilmente detto dal personale che nulla ha a che fare con tutto ciò, che per gli "stranieri" c è da pagare una tassa di 120.000 rupie (cosa che cambia di non poco il.prezzo totale della stanza) e che è la "legge" di aceh. ho passato precedentemente 2 settimane spettacolari ad aceh e non ho mai avuto questo tipo di problema anzi mi sentivo a casa ovunque andavo non uno "straniero". quindi faccio notare al gentile receptionist che questa è una menzogna e che non ho intenzione di pagare. successivamente dopo una telefonata col suo capo mi viene comunicato che magicamente la tassa è scesa a 60.000 rupie e che se non accettavo ero libero di cambiare hotel (grazie molto gentile, non sapevo di avere questo diritto essendo straniero). sfortunamente per l'orario in cui sono arrivato in città e per, ahimè, aver pagato online tramite agoda sobo dovuto restare e accettare questo vergognoso ricatto.
agoda dovrebbe come minimo cancellare la collaborazione con queste persone.

aceh non merita un posto cosi

At arrival they told me I had to pay an extra fee of 100k as a foreigner… the girl behind the desk didn’t look like an adult and communication was poor. I left this place and booked something else instead
